ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of trying on a high-heeled shoe, showcasing a careful and slightly dramatic movement. The sequence will involve both arms, with the left arm holding the shoe and the right arm assisting or reacting. The movement should convey a sense of anticipation and perhaps even slight excitement or vanity. Frame 1 will show the left arm holding the shoe at waist height, while the right arm rests by the side. Frame 2 will show the left arm carefully raising the shoe to the foot, while the right arm moves slightly forward in anticipation. Frame 3 depicts the shoe being placed on the foot and the arms assuming a pose of satisfaction or contemplation. Frame 4 shows the robot admiring the shoe on its foot. Frame 5 shows the robot striking a pose to show off the shoe.

frames.beat: arms rest, left holding shoe at waist
left arm lifts shoe, right arm moves forward
shoe placed on foot, arms pose with satisfaction
robot admires the shoe on its foot
striking a pose to show off the shoe
